## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.010 — Definitions.

As used in chapters 484A to 484E , inclusive, of NRS, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484A.015 to 484A.320 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
